# Everything EvenHub Skill Snapshot

This directory vendors `even-realities/everything-evenhub` for Codex user-scope
skills exposed under `~/.agents/skills/evenhub-*`.

- Source: https://github.com/even-realities/everything-evenhub
- Snapshot: `ce0869f61978a8e1795fdadb171988bd61d049de`
- Snapshot date checked: 2026-04-26
- Latest tag at import time: `v0.0.2`

The upstream project is a Claude Code plugin. This copy adapts the skill
frontmatter, skill names, and invocation wording for Codex while preserving the
upstream skill content and harness checklists as local reference material.

Public skill entrypoints are exposed as symlinks:

- `evenhub-background-state`
- `evenhub-build-and-deploy`
- `evenhub-cli-reference`
- `evenhub-design-guidelines`
- `evenhub-device-features`
- `evenhub-font-measurement`
- `evenhub-glasses-ui`
- `evenhub-handle-input`
- `evenhub-quickstart`
- `evenhub-sdk-reference`
- `evenhub-simulator-automation`
- `evenhub-template`
- `evenhub-test-with-simulator`
